expectations.text: uses-hyva-prefixed-handles: Recommends scoping all overrides to hyva_*-prefixed layout handles so Luma store view is unaffected
separate-module-not-theme-customization: Recommends a separate Magento module (composer package or app/code), not edits to the original module's vendor files
mentions-extra-hyva-themes-key: Mentions the `extra.hyva-themes.compat-module-for` Composer key (or hyva-themes.json) for registration
removes-knockout-and-ui-components: States that Knockout, UI components, RequireJS, and x-magento-init must be replaced (not retained) for the Hyvä side
uses-alpine-tailwind-replacement: Suggests Alpine.js + Tailwind for the Hyvä-side reimplementation
module-sequence-or-dependency: Recommends declaring a module sequence (etc/module.xml) or composer require dependency on the original module + Hyva_Theme
mentions-tracker-or-existing-compat: Mentions checking if a compat module already exists (compatibility module tracker) before building one — saves duplicate work
